description: Grade 1 Mathematics learning areas for numbers, shapes, and simple operations.

learningAreas.title: Numbers
learningAreas.description: Count, read, write, and compare numbers using familiar objects.

learningAreas.title: Addition
learningAreas.description: Join small groups and count how many altogether.

learningAreas.title: Subtraction
learningAreas.description: Take away objects and find how many are left.

learningAreas.title: Shapes
learningAreas.description: Recognise and name simple shapes around home and school.
